hero.bio: I am a Computer Engineering graduate specializing in Fullstack Development and DevOps. I build scalable RESTful APIs and modern UIs, with a focus on CI/CD, containerization, and cloud infrastructure for seamless software delivery.

experience.title: Professional
experience.subtitle: Journey
experience.description: My career path as a Web App Developer, dedicated to high-performance applications and clean architecture.

details: Developed core competencies in backend and frontend stack.
Developed a simple quiz application for training tasks using React.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.
Contributed to the development of the Bossman App Dashboard at Soca AI.
Migrated a monolithic service to a microservices architecture to improve scalability and maintainability.
Managed development tasks and collaboration using Trello and Gitlab.

items.role: Full Stack Developer (Independent Study at Kampus Merdeka)
details: Mastered Java, OOP, MVC, and Unit Testing.
Developed SQL, PL/SQL, and ORM (JPA/Hibernate) skills.
Built REST APIs with Spring Boot and Implemented Clean architecture.
Explored security mechanisms (RBAC, JWT, Basic Auth, Password Hashing).
Worked with front-end technologies (JavaScript, Bootstrap, jQuery, API consumption).
Applied software design (UML, ERD, BPMN), Agile Development, and version control (Git).
